00027 #ifndef JELATINE_JELATINE_VMRESOURCESTREAM_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_JELATINE_VMRESOURCESTREAM_H (1)
00029 
00030 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00031 
00032 #include "wrappers.h"
00033 
00034 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00035 #   include <zzip/lib.h>
00036 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00037 
00038 #include "array.h"
00039 #include "header.h"
00040 
00043 struct jelatine_VMResourceStream_t {
00044     uintptr_t resource; 
00045     header_t header; 
00046     ZZIP_FILE *handle; 
00047 #if SIZEOF_VOID_P == 2
00048     uint16_t padding; 
00049 #endif // SIZEOF_VOID_P == 2
00050     int32_t available; 
00051 };
00052 
00054 typedef struct jelatine_VMResourceStream_t jelatine_VMResourceStream_t;
00055 
00057 #define JELATINE_VMRESOURCESTREAM_REF2PTR(r) \
00058     ((jelatine_VMResourceStream_t *) ((r) \
00059      - offsetof(jelatine_VMResourceStream_t, header)))
00060 
00062 #define JELATINE_VMRESOURCESTREAM_PTR2REF(p) \
00063     ((uintptr_t) (p) + offsetof(jelatine_VMResourceStream_t, header))
00064 
00065 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00066 
00067 #endif // !JELATINE_JELATINE_VMRESOURCESTREAM_H
